description:
This template is designed for creating personal business cards using Vue 3. It includes a basic structure with a main entry point, shared CSS, and an entry component. The template also supports UnoCSS and Sass for styling, and TypeScript for programming. The template is intended for developers who want to quickly set up a personal business card project with a modern technology stack. All user information is stored in the public/config.yaml file. If you need to modify user information, please directly edit config.yaml. The following information is project's README file content: 001|technology stack
002|
003|- Build Tool: Vite
004|- Styling: UnoCSS, Sass
005|- Programming Language: TypeScript
006|- Framework: Vue 3
007|
008|Project File Structure and Descriptions
009|
010|1. ./src/main.ts is the main entry point of the project.
011|2. ./src/style.css is the shared CSS file for the project.
012|3. ./src/App.vue is the entry component.
013|4. ./assets is the directory for storing static assets.
014|5. ./index.html is the root HTML file of the project.
015|6. ./unocss.config.ts is the configuration file for UnoCSS.
016|7. ./components/brand.vue is the component used for rendering the shortcut icon.
017|8. ./assets/logo.json stores the relationship between the company's domain names and their corresponding logo images
018|9. ./package.json is the path of package.json
019|
020|Install
021|
022|```shell
023|pnpm install
024|```
025|
026|Build
027|
028|```shell
029|Pnpm run build
030|```
